description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:27.5.1 Docker image with a docker:dind service and a global before_script installing bash and showing the Docker version. Define three stages: build, test, and pages. In the build stage add a build-napi job that runs `docker login -u gitlab-ci-token -p $CI_JOB_TOKEN registry.gitlab.com`, sources the file `build.env`, and executes `./ci_build_image.sh`. Also in the build stage add a manual build-tester-images job that runs the same login and source commands, then `cd tests`, `docker compose build`, and `docker compose push`. In the test stage add a unittest job that installs jq, logs in to the registry, sources `build.env`, changes to the tests directory and runs `./run_unit_tests.sh`, publishing the `tests/coverage/` directory as an artifact. Finally, in the pages stage add a pages job that moves `tests/coverage/` to a `public/` folder, publishes the `public/` directory as a pages artifact that expires after 30 days, and runs only on the master branch.
